docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,202.00 FILED BY CHARLES, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY SERVICES C/O HERITAGE HOMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, CHRISTINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLES, CHRISTINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCY SERVICES C/O HERITAGE HOMES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
